critical_code_review_comments: Testid inconsistency: /play page DimExpandedModal uses data-testid='dim-tab-products' and 'dim-tab-personalised' (no 'play-' prefix), while /dine/care/go use 'dine-dim-tab-*', 'care-dim-tab-*', 'go-dim-tab-*'. Minor inconsistency but works.

DineSoulPage uses contextPets undefined check: 'if (contextPets !== undefined) setLoading(false)' — since contextPets starts as [] (not undefined), loading flashes as false immediately before pets load. This causes brief NoPetState flash on initial load, but the page recovers once pets are fetched.
seed_data_creation: Created session token test_session_play_1773808049077 (not used - JWT-based auth was used instead)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 pillars (play/dine/care/go) now have Personalised tab working. PlayCategoryStrip (6 buttons) successfully opens DimExpandedModal. Test approach: set localStorage tdb_auth_token + selectedPetId='pet-mojo-7327ad56', then reload page and use wait_for_function to wait for pet to load.
